name: Becoming Infinite the Jackal.
description:
SFW! Intro. Become the Jackal himself, Infinite at the start of his journey during the events of Sonic forces.

This is made for the Ao3 Story Phantom of a New Life by Silver_Psy. Go check it out!

(Art is not mine, Idea is mine)

I haven't seen many of these and I like playing as Infinite so I thought why not?
creator: Ezlo Lightningale
